title: Home Rehabilitation Programs * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Home Rehabilitation Programs * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions 3 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Older Adults Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF REACH COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT INC COMMUNITY BUILDERS PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides minor home and safety repairs. Staff, volunteers, and subcontractors complete repairs as resources are available. Services may include home assessments, smoke/fire alarms, carbon monoxide detectors, bathroom safety aids, address housing code violations, yard nuisances, minor plumbing, and electrical repairs. Also assists with referrals to other home repair programs. 4150 S Moody Avenue Portland, OR 97239 Eligibility: -Age 55 and older and/or adults with a permanent disability -Must own and occupy home needing the repairs -50% of area median income or less Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-4pm Email (503) 501-5719 Get Directions Visit Website More Details REFIT REMODELING FOR INDEPENDENCE TOGETHER REFIT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides home modification services for physically and financially challenged homeowners who wish to remain living independently in their homes. Can provide wheelchair ramps, ADA toilets, showers, grab bars, and widen doorways and other spaces. Anything that makes the home safer for a person with a mobility disability. This program does not do home repairs. PO Box 916 Lake Oswego, OR 97034 Eligibility: Homeowner must have income below 80% of the Median Family Income and limited mobility. Assets (not including home and car) cannot exceed $20,000. No services for mobile homes, trailers, modular homes, apartments, or condominiums. Hours: Monday-Friday 10am-4pm Email (503) 698-8382 Get Directions Visit Website More Details WASHINGTON COUNTY COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT HOME ACCESS AND REPAIR FOR THE DISABLED, ELDERLY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides grants of up to $10,000 for home repairs such as electrical wiring, heating, roofs, foundations, removal of decks and porches and accessibility modifications such as widening of doors, installation of ramps, walk-in/roll-in showers, grab bars, and hearing impaired smoke detectors. 328 W Main Street Suite 100 Hillsboro, OR 97123 Eligibility: Homeowners age 62 or older or adults with disabilities who have less than $100,000 in assets. Applicants must live on on the property if applying for home repairs, renters are only eligible for accessibility modifications. Hours: Tuesday-Thursday 11am-2pm Email (503) 846-8814 Get Directions Visit Website More Details REACH COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT INC COMMUNITY BUILDERS PROGRAM REFIT REMODELING FOR INDEPENDENCE TOGETHER REFIT WASHINGTON COUNTY COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT HOME ACCESS AND REPAIR FOR THE DISABLED, ELDERLY
